description_long: This is an adult male figure with a lean build, standing with arms extended outward in a T-pose. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, V-neck t-shirt with a chest pocket and a pair of fitted pants. The figure's facial features are well-defined, with short hair and a clean-shaven face. His feet are bare, and his hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread. The clothing fits closely to the body, showing the contours of the torso and limbs. The overall appearance is casual and modern, suitable for an urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing in a T-pose, wearing a fitted t-shirt and pants with bare feet and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest pocket on the t-shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the t-shirt and pants from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the body and leg.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
